items.title: NASA selects Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for a 2028 mission to Mars
items.summary: Relativity Space, the rocket company led by former Google executive Eric Schmidt, was picked to launch NASA's Aeolus payload to Mars in 2028, as reported earlier by TechCrunch....
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Do fitness trackers still work if you have tattoos?
items.summary: The short answer is: sometimes, but it's complicated.

items.title: Every fusion startup that has raised over $100M
items.summary: Fusion startups have raised $7.1 billion to date, with the majority of it going to a handful of companies.
